title: Why the Future of AI Will Be Decided at the Edge
subtitle: Check the Research Desk slides below for our 2024–2030 view on how this shift is happening and could redefine global AI access.
description: Most of the AI race is still being framed around bigger models, massive GPU clusters, and rising cloud bills.

title: Global AI Access Gap
subtitle: Why AI must be optimized for data-poor smartphone users, not only the top 1%
description: This note explains the scale problem in AI, the access gap in emerging markets, and why AI-for-All uses edge-cloud orchestration to route most low-token queries on-device and cut costs by 50-80%.

title: Why Unit Economics Will Decide the Winner of the AI Race
subtitle: Most AI platforms are built for the 1%—users with high-end hardware and unlimited data. But the next billion users operate in a different reality.
description: Check the slides below for the architectural breakdown of how we are making intelligence a sustainable utility for everyone.
